raw_consumer_statement: I haven't done business with Barclay 's Bank in years. I previously had a Priceline card with them. I recently started receiving text messages about making a payment, but I didn't think anything of it because I haven't used their card. I noticed my XXXX score went down XXXX points because they reported me, and logged into my Barclay 's account and noticed I had a Jetblue card that I never signed up for and they charged me an annual fee of {$99.00}. I informed them of this, they said because I did not contact them within XXXX days of the annual fee being charged they refuse to waive it. I told them on XX/XX/year> that I never signed up for the card, all they did was cancel my account and still claim I owe them {$99.00}. I am not paying the {$99.00} for a card that I never signed up for as I did not sign up for it. I would not sign up for a card with an annual fee. The fact that they are damaging my credit after I already explained this to them is unsettling.
